question_text: From the graph shown below, how many real zeros does the polynomial have?

answer_key.explanation: The curve crosses the x-axis at two distinct points, so the polynomial has two real zeros.
common_mistakes: Counting turning points instead of x-intercepts.

visual.caption: Polynomial curve on the coordinate plane.
visual.altText: A continuous curve drawn from negative to positive x values, crossing the horizontal axis at two separate places.
